extDescription.message: Polls relay account status; when expired, refreshes via your local browser (residential IP) and submits new cookies to stay online beyond the 2-hour limit.

actionTitle.message: Gemini Cookie Keep-Alive (click to open side panel)

accountIdTitle.message: Relay account ID bound to this browser profile

bindHint.message: Multi-account: set one account ID per browser profile. Leave empty to auto-match by PSID.

cookieEmptyHint.message: Click Read to view local cookies

noRelayConfigured.message: Relay not configured — open Settings (top right)

notLoggedInGemini.message: Not signed in to Gemini — open and sign in at gemini.google.com

relayNoAccount.message: ⚠ Relay has no account $1 — check settings

cookieMatchOk.message: ✓ Local cookie matches account $1 — will submit to it

cookieMismatchWarn.message: Local cookie differs from account $1 record (updated cookie is normal) — still submitting to that account

autoMatchOk.message: ✓ Auto-matched account $1 — will submit to it

noAccountIdMismatch.message: ⚠ No account ID set and PSID matches none — bind an account ID in the side panel

clearedBinding.message: Binding cleared — will auto-match by PSID

confirmRefresh.message: Refresh the local Gemini tab and submit new cookies to the relay?

optionsSub.message: Configure relay connection (API URL, key, polling). Bind accounts in the main side panel.

hintApiKey.message: Relay sk- key; if ADMIN_API_KEY is set (gemini2api ≥ v1.6.16), use the admin key here

hintCooldown.message: Skip duplicate refresh for same account

msgSavedNoPerm.message: ⚠ Saved but host permission not granted — requests will fail; save again and allow

errNoGeminiTab.message: No open gemini.google.com tab — open one and sign in

logTabSlow.message: Tab loading slowly — waiting for Google to rotate PSIDTS…

logAccountCooldown.message: Account $1 in cooldown — skipping this round

logAccountExpiredSubmit.message: Account $1 expired and matches local — submitting new cookies…

logCheckAfterSubmitFail.message: Account $1 post-submit check failed: $2 — will verify next poll

logNoRelayUrl.message: Relay URL not configured — open Settings first

logNoPsidAfterRefresh.message: No local __Secure-1PSID after refresh — not signed in to Gemini, cannot keep alive

logPsidMismatchStillSubmit.message: Note: local PSID differs from account $1 record (cookie changed — normal) — still submitting to bound account

logNoAccountIdNoMatch.message: No account ID and local PSID($1…) matches no expired account — bind an account ID in the side panel

logNoLocalPsid.message: Cannot read local PSID — not signed in to Gemini

logRelayNoAccount.message: Relay has no account $1 — check settings

logNoAccountIdMatch.message: No account ID and local PSID($1…) matches no account — bind account ID in side panel
